videos.title: Burning Our Opponent with The Top of Our Deck
videos.description:
Duskmourn's Claim aka The Parker Luck might help turn Mono black Annex into  a silly burn deck!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-burning-our-opponent-with-the-top-of-our-deck
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7377532#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/qoteQ
